business_name: Salon Lofts Shoppes at San Felipe
notes: 1415 S Voss Rd, Houston TX 77057. Multiple salon suite operators confirmed at this address including Salon Lofts (Suite 200), Amazing Lash Studio (Ste 225, 713-977-6666). Permit for 'new salon - suite rental concept' strongly matches existing Salon Lofts suite-rental model.
